narration: Radar doesn't need light — it listens for radio echoes bouncing off objects.
visual_description: Hook visual: Radar doesn't need light — it listens for radio echoes bouncing off objects.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Radar doesn't need light — it listens for radio echoes bouncing off objects.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Radar doesn't need light — it listens for radio echoes bouncing off objects.

narration: How does it work? Radar sends out pulses of radio waves, like invisible messengers.
visual_description: Context visual: How does it work? Radar sends out pulses of radio waves, like invisible messengers.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: How does it work? Radar sends out pulses of radio waves, like invisible messengers.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: How does it work? Radar sends out pulses of radio waves, like invisible messengers.

narration: When these waves hit an object, they bounce back, creating echoes.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When these waves hit an object, they bounce back, creating echoes.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When these waves hit an object, they bounce back, creating echoes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When these waves hit an object, they bounce back, creating echoes.

narration: By measuring the time it takes for echoes to return, radar calculates distance.
visual_description: Evidence visual: By measuring the time it takes for echoes to return, radar calculates distance.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: By measuring the time it takes for echoes to return, radar calculates distance.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: By measuring the time it takes for echoes to return, radar calculates distance.

narration: This means radar can see through fog, revealing what’s ahead, even in zero visibility.
visual_description: Payoff visual: This means radar can see through fog, revealing what’s ahead, even in zero visibility.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: This means radar can see through fog, revealing what’s ahead, even in zero visibility.
